attribution: Tehalö gambara moroi ba gokhöta samösa, moroi ba naha bö'ö ma zui moroi ba Wikimedia Commons nitehegö molo'ö lisensi Creative Commons.
bookmarks_added: No tenönö ba gangolifa wanandra nga'örö
bookmarks_removed: No teheta moroi ba gangolifa wanandara nga'örö
contribute_description:
Ŵara haniha na tenga ya'ita samösa zama'anö fangi'ila ba li khöda. Dali ita fefu na tarorogö hada, hikaya awö li Nono Niha.
Ae fao falulu halöŵö ba wama'anö fangi'ila ba Wiki khöda. La'andrö saohagölö khöu iraonoda miföna dania.
create_new_wikibooks_page:
Dafaoma tafalului wama'anö nösi Wikibuku
ba wondrou'ö fangi'ila ba gotalua niha khöda
create_new_wikipedia_page:
Dafaoma tafalului wama'anö nösi Wikipedia
ba wondrou'ö fangi'ila ba gotalua niha khöda
create_new_wiktionary_page:
Dafaoma tafalului wama'anö nösi Wikikamus
ba wondrou'ö fangi'ila ba gotalua niha khöda
enter_word_here: Sura ngawua wehede sibohou ba da'a
error_fetching_random_article: So zifasala me uhalö gofu nga'örö
error_loading_rules: So zifasala me uhalö goi-goi html
fetching_random_article: Mangai ösi gofu nga'örö yaŵa ba gu'ö...
footer_disclaimer: All content in this application is sourced from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons. The developer of this app is not responsible for the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of the information provided. The accuracy and validity of the content are the responsibility of the contributors to each Wikipedia article.
footer_license: Texts and images are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike License (CC BY-SA). You are free to share and adapt the material, provided you give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.\n\nSpecific Attributions: 1) The ornament Ni'oŵeŵemagai is by Lewi Zega via Wikimedia Commons; 2) The image Woman Reading a Book on Lap is by Prasanna Kumar via Wikimedia Commons. For more details, visit the Wikipedia Terms of Use and the Creative Commons License.
motto: Moroi khöda, soguna khöda, ba soguna khö ndraonoda miföna
onboarding_desc_1: He Wikipedia, Wikikamus ba he Wikibuku, oi so manö. Tola öfalali wiki dania bakha ba aplikasi ba menu ba ngai.
onboarding_desc_2: Alio wanöndra gofu hadia zomasi'ö ö'alui me so nahia wangalui ba golayama.
onboarding_desc_3: Ösöndra zura somasi'ö? Tandrai, fa'ohe'ö ma zui bulö'ö ia. Tola manö
onboarding_desc_4: Faha'ögö ba li Niha (so wamahaö sibohou ero waŵa) ma zui sasai hörö faoma ngawalö gambara moroi ba Danö Niha
onboarding_desc_5: Höndrögö hagu harazaki ba söndra gofu nga'örö si lö mudöna-döna ba samehi'a tödö khöu.
onboarding_desc_6: Oguna'ö lala sadogo silalö ba nga'örö soguna sibai ba wiki. Ö'ila oi ngawalö lala sadogo na öbokai menu ba ngai bakha ba aplikasi.
select_language_description: Fili li halöŵö Wiki somasi'ö ö'ohalöŵögöi. So wiki ba li Niha, li Indonesia ba ba li Inggris.
title_example: duma-dumania: Fangötö Bongi ba Hada Huruna
title: Högö zura
webview_mobile_warning: Lö nifaudugö wamazökhi nga'örö andre ba telepon seluler. Tola manö wa so nösi si lö oroma ma lö enahöi wangoroma'ö ya'ia. Fahuhuo khö administrator wiki ena'ö la'ehaogö nga'örö andre molo'ö rekomendasi Wikimedia (Alui ba Google: "Recommendations for mobile friendly articles on Wikimedia wikis")
